site.title: Paulo Tuya | Business Development, Partnerships, Project Delivery
site.description: Portfolio of Paulo Tuya, a commercially fluent operator connecting business development, partnerships, and project delivery across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

hero.name: I turn partner and project goals into clear execution
hero.pitch: Commercially fluent, cross-functional execution across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

values.title: How I Work
values.subtitle: Commercial context, aligned stakeholders, and structured execution.
values.card1Text: I turn loose goals into scopes, owners, timelines, and operating artifacts that make execution easier to trust.
values.card2Text: I keep partners, teams, vendors, and internal stakeholders aligned without letting handoffs or approvals derail delivery.
values.card3Text: I care about readiness, issue handling, and closeout quality as much as kickoff energy, because delivery is judged at the finish line.
values.blogLinkText: The blog expands on the operating patterns behind this work, from project delivery to partnerships and commercial execution.

skills.title: Capability Clusters
